item.title: Immigration is Trump's best and worst issue: ABC News/Washington Post/Ipsos poll
item.description: We asked Trump approvers and disapprovers what his best and worst moves were.

item.title: US military seizes 3rd ship in Indian Ocean linked to Venezuela
item.description: The Pentagon announced the third seizure in the Indian Ocean of an oil tanker allegedly linked to Venezuela’s illicit oil operation that had fled the ...

item.title: WATCH: Meet Punch the monkey
item.description: "GMA" looks at why the internet is obsessed with Punch, the baby monkey who went viral with his plushie.

item.title: WATCH: The story behind 'Front Porch Freestyles'
item.description: The YouTube hit uses one artist’s front porch as a stage for emerging artists and music stars alike.

item.title: Savannah Guthrie announces new reward for Nancy Guthrie: 'Somebody knows'
item.description: "Today" show host Savannah Guthrie announced on Tuesday a new $1 million reward for the recovery of her mom, Nancy Guthrie, who has been missing since...
